items.title: relay.md — agent guide
items.description: How your agent drives Relay from Claude Code (the mix relay CLI + REST API).

items.title: CLAUDE.md include
items.description: Wires @relay.md in so Claude Code reads the Relay agent guide.

items.title: AGENTS.md include
items.description: Wires @relay.md in so every agent reads the Relay agent guide.

items.title: executor config
items.description: How many jobs this machine runs at once and in which isolation class (capacity is the field you tune).

items.title: acceptance-tester agent
items.description: Run the card's human-authored acceptance criteria against the branch and return a per-criterion verdict. Used by the Code flow's `acceptance` node after smoke passes; the card ref arrives in the message. Returns pass/fail/blocked plus a per-criterion checklist.

items.title: final-fixer agent
items.description: Fix all blocking findings from the whole-branch review in one consolidated pass, keeping the suite green. Used by the Code flow's `final_fix` node; the findings arrive in the message.

items.title: final-reviewer agent
items.description: Whole-branch cross-cutting review after all plan tasks are done and precommit passes — catches issues per-task reviews miss. Used by the Code flow's `final_review` node. Returns a pass/findings verdict.

items.title: plan-implementer agent
items.description: Implement ONE task from the plan at $RELAY_PLAN using strict TDD. Used by the Code flow's `implement` node (a `foreach` loop, one iteration per task); the specific task (and any reviewer findings to address) arrive in the message.

items.title: quality-reviewer agent
items.description: Stage 2 review — judge whether a spec-passing plan task change is well-built (clean, conventional, meaningful tests). Used by the Code flow's `quality_review` node; the task is named in the message. Returns a pass/findings verdict.

items.title: rebaser agent
items.description: Rebase the current feature branch onto origin/main and resolve conflicts preserving both intents, leaving the branch green (mix precommit) — or abort cleanly and escalate. The Code flow's `sync_fix` / `resync_fix` nodes name it (RLY-192); also invocable by hand for a conflict-safe rebase.

items.title: smoke-tester agent
items.description: Final gate — prove the branch's new functionality actually works by driving it end-to-end through the running app, and (for UI) screenshot each new/changed state and compare it to the matching docs/designs artboard. Used by the Code flow's `smoke` node after precommit + whole-branch review pass. Returns a pass/broken/blocked verdict with screenshot paths.

items.title: spec-reviewer agent
items.description: Stage 1 review — verify a just-implemented plan task matches its spec in the plan (at $RELAY_PLAN) (nothing missing, nothing extra). Used by the Code flow's `spec_review` node; the task under review is named in the message. Returns a pass/findings verdict.

items.title: brainstorm skill
items.description: Use BEFORE any feature, component, UI, or behavior work, and before entering plan mode — for every project however small, when no approved design exists yet. Also invocable as /brainstorm.

items.title: receiving-code-review skill
items.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing any of it — especially if feedback seems unclear, technically questionable, or conflicts with a prior decision.

items.title: systematic-debugging skill
items.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes.

items.title: test-driven-development skill
items.description: Use when implementing any feature, bugfix, refactor, or behavior change, before writing implementation code.

items.title: verification-before-completion skill
items.description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, or to express satisfaction, or before committing/pushing/opening a PR or moving to the next task.
